overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a vibrant dystopian outdoor market and training area with yellow scaffolding, makeshift stalls, and boxing equipment. The player moves through narrow corridors, observes NPCs fighting in an open ring, browses market stalls, and enters a covered parking garage with futuristic vehicles.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor lined with training equipment and makeshift stalls

notable_agents.action: NPC with green hair standing near punching bag equipment
shirtless NPC walking away from camera toward the scaffolding tower

entered.detail: tall industrial structure with yellow safety panels and metal walkways
glowing blue neon sign reading 'SWEAT EXCELLENCE' on corrugated metal wall
red heavy punching bag hanging from metal frame with training equipment
rusty metal structure with open doorway serving as market stall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow concrete corridor flanked by makeshift training equipment. A prominent yellow scaffolding tower rises in the distance, while neon signs and punching bags line the left side. The player walks forward past various NPCs in this dystopian market alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: market entrance approaching canvas tent structure

events.description: entering green canvas tent structure with overhead covering

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a green canvas tent while passing NPCs training with weights

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on wooden bench working on equipment

entered.detail: large military-style canvas tent with open front serving as covered walkway
simple wooden bench with NPC sitting and working on gear

segments.scene_description: The player moves toward and enters a green canvas tent structure. The yellow scaffolding tower shifts to the left as the perspective changes. Inside the tent, ceiling fans are visible overhead, and the lighting becomes slightly dimmer before emerging on the other side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open fighting ring area with training equipment

events.description: exiting tent into open area with raised fighting platform

agents.ego_description: exiting the tent and approaching an outdoor fighting ring where NPCs are training

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sparring on the fighting ring platform

entered.detail: raised concrete platform with yellow border serving as combat training area
metal chain-link fencing surrounding the training area
tall palm tree visible against the sky in the background

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tent reveals an open fighting ring where two NPCs are actively sparring. The area is surrounded by chain-link fencing with palm trees visible in the background. The ground is covered in yellow-green moss or paint, and various training equipment is scattered around the perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market plaza with overhead wooden canopy

events.description: pausing briefly to observe NPCs fighting in the ring before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking past the fighting ring while observing the sparring match and moving toward the market stalls

notable_agents.action: NPC with pink hair sitting on ground near barbell weights

entered.detail: large wooden beam structure overhead providing partial shade
makeshift vendor stalls with colorful umbrellas and merchandise

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the fighting ring where combat continues, entering a more open market area covered by a massive wooden overhead canopy. Market stalls with colorful umbrellas line the right side, while debris and construction materials are visible on the left. The atmosphere is busy with scattered NPCs browsing and walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with vendor stalls and debris

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market area passing various stalls and groups of NPCs

entered.detail: vibrant red, yellow, and blue umbrellas shading vendor stalls
piles of concrete rubble and construction debris along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market area, the player passes under the extensive wooden canopy. Colorful umbrellas shade vendor stalls on the right, while debris piles line the left. The yellow scaffolding structure remains visible in the distance, and the crowd density increases slightly with NPCs walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with futuristic vehicles and skylights

events.description: entering covered parking garage from outdoor market area
camera tilts upward to look at ceiling beams and skylights

agents.ego_description: entering a dark parking garage, walking past futuristic vehicles, and looking up at the architectural details

notable_agents.action: NPC walking across the garage toward the exit

entered.detail: large concrete parking structure with metal beams and overhead lighting
sleek black cyberpunk-style vehicle with aerodynamic design
narrow vertical skylights between ceiling beams allowing natural light to enter
teal-colored sports car with glowing accents parked near the exit

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered parking garage, transitioning from bright outdoor light to dimmer interior lighting. Futuristic vehicles are parked along the right side, including a prominent black car and a teal sports car. The camera tilts upward to reveal impressive ceiling beams and skylights before continuing toward the garage exit where construction scaffolding is visible outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, industrial alleyway into an open-air combat arena. It begins in a concrete corridor lined with neon signs and punching bags, moving forward toward a towering yellow scaffolding structure. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into the dim interior of a green canvas tent where ceiling fans rotate overhead, momentarily obscuring the bright outdoor light. The perspective then emerges from the tent to reveal a wide fighting ring where two NPCs spar on a yellow-green ground. Finally, the view expands to show the ring enclosed by chain-link fencing with palm trees rising in the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling outdoor market into the dim, industrial interior of a futuristic parking garage. It begins by moving past a fighting ring and entering an open market area sheltered by a massive wooden overhead canopy, where colorful umbrellas and vendor stalls line the right side against piles of debris on the left. As the camera pushes deeper under the canopy, the crowd density increases and the yellow scaffolding of the training area remains visible in the distance. The scene then shifts as the player transitions from the bright outdoor light into a covered garage, passing a row of futuristic vehicles including a prominent black car and a teal sports car. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal heavy ceiling beams and skylights before moving toward the garage exit where construction scaffolding reappears in the distance.
